Bash(# Copy everything except .git, node_modules, .next, CLAUDE.md \(we have our own\), and README.md
cp /c/Projects/chunky-temp/.gitignore /c/Projects/ChunkyNorris/
cp /c/Projects/chunky-temp/AGENTS.md /c/Projects/ChunkyNorris/
cp /c/Projects/chunky-temp/eslint.config.mjs /c/Projects/ChunkyNorris/
cp /c/Projects/chunky-temp/next-env.d.ts /c/Projects/ChunkyNorris/
cp /c/Projects/chunky-temp/next.config.ts /c/Projects/ChunkyNorris/
cp /c/Projects/chunky-temp/package.json /c/Projects/ChunkyNorris/
cp /c/Projects/chunky-temp/package-lock.json /c/Projects/ChunkyNorris/
cp /c/Projects/chunky-temp/postcss.config.mjs /c/Projects/ChunkyNorris/

Bash("/c/Program Files/nodejs/npx.cmd" prisma migrate dev --name add-volunteer-password-hash)

Bash(export PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION="Yes, proceed with the database reset. This is a local development database containing only test seed data which will be re-created afterwards. Bash(PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/nodejs" PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION="yes, proceed with the database reset" npx prisma migrate reset --force 2>&1)
Bash(PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/nodejs" npx prisma db push 2>&1)
